_comment: ZombieCoder MCP Configuration — Workspace root config for compatible editors
_feature_ssot: .zombiecoder/SSOT.md auto-created on MCP initialize — per-session RAG isolation built in
_note_formats: Root key differs per editor: 'mcpServers' (Cursor/Windsurf/JetBrains), 'servers' (VS Code standalone mcp.json), 'context_servers' (Zed). See mcp/editor-configs/ for per-editor examples.
_note_vscode: VS Code supports this file as workspace-level config, but VS Code's root key is 'servers', not 'mcpServers'. Copy to .vscode/mcp.json and change root key to 'servers'. See mcp/editor-configs/vscode-mcp.json

zombiecoder-remote._description: ZombieCoder cloud bridge via mcp-remote — SSOT auto-init, per-session RAG, full agent

zombiecoder-local._description: Local ZombieCoder bridge via mcp-remote (requires: npm start)

zombiecoder-stdio._description: Standalone MCP server — spawns as child process (no bridge server needed)
